title: Tulon's task force
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} [[File:Tulon_squad.jpg|thumb|250px|Tulon's task force.]] {{Quote|General, we're picking up heavy weapons fire nearby!"
"The Rebels are attacking Tulon's units?"
"No, sir! That is most definitely ''not'' the situation here."
"What are you saying?"
"One of Tulon's walkers is attacking the rest of his units!|Anonymous subordinate and [[Brenn Tantor]]|''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''}} In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Beri Tulon]] was assigned to lead an [[Imperial Army/Legends|army]] detachment in the [[Massacre on Abridon]]. '''Tulon's task force''' consisted of one [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]], three [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transports]], and four [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. Unknown to the rest of the force, Tulon intended to use the opportunity to defect to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] base that he was supposed to be assaulting. Tulon turned the [[Annihilator 1]], his personal AT-AT, on the rest of the detachment, killing them all, and fled towards the base. However, the forces of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Brenn Tantor]], who was supposed to join up with Tulon for the assault, pursued him and brought his walker down before he reached the base. Tantor was shocked to discover that Tulon, his old mentor, was attempting to defect—not killed or injured at the hands of a disloyal subordinate. Tulon was seized and transferred to [[Tarkin Detention Facility]] on [[Ruul (planet)|Ruul]] while Tantor completed the base's destruction alone. ==Members== '''Individuals''' *[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Beri Tulon]] *[[Garryg]] *[[Samiam]] *[[Unco]] *[[Gland]] '''Units''' *[[Annihilator 1]] *[[Mo-die]] *[[Freeze]] *[[Chorizo]] ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Imperial task forces]]
